name: Green Tomato Minced Meat Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover meat with water and simmer until tender.
2. Force meat, suet, tomatoes, and apples through a coarse food chopper.
3. Add remaining ingredients (except brandy) and simmer for 1 hour, stirring frequently.
4. Fill hot, sterilized 1 quart jars.
5. Place 2 tbsp. brandy on top, if desired.
6. Seal the jars and store in a cool place.
